title: dieffenbachia mortoniana
intro: Dieffenbachia mortoniana, also known as the Dumb Cane, is a species of flowering plant in the family Arum, native to Central and South America. The plant contains medicinal properties, including the presence of calcium oxalate crystals, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation and fever. The health benefits of Dieffenbachia mortoniana include its potential to lower blood pressure and act as a diuretic, making it useful for treating conditions such as hypertension and urinary problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and have been traditionally used in folk medicine for their medicinal properties.
